field.name: agentId
field.description: Opaque, stable identity (sequenced for user-created; explicit stable id in seed data).

field.name: agentName
field.description: Editable, human-friendly label. Unique across agents.

field.name: description
field.description: What the agent is for (authored with guidance; may seed the prompt).

field.name: responseSchema
field.description: Optional JSON Schema (as text). When set, run#Agent returns a typed structuredResult Map; adapters translate to the provider's native structured-output mechanism.

field.name: contextStrategy
field.description: off (default) | window. window = bound the replayed history + offer the remember tool + inject pinned facts (ADR 0001 Phase 1).

field.name: contextWindowMessages
field.description: When contextStrategy=window: max replayed prior-turn messages to keep (current turn always kept). Default 20 when unset.

field.name: contextWindowChars
field.description: When contextStrategy=window: char-estimate guard (~chars/4 tokens) for the assembled view. Default 48000 when unset.

field.name: knowledgeMaxChars
field.description: Optional per-agent override of the injected-knowledge char cap. Null = use ai_knowledge_max_chars config default (24000).

field.name: reasoningEffort
field.description: none (default/unset) | low | medium | high. Provider-agnostic reasoning depth. OpenAI → reasoning_effort (reasoning-capable models only). Anthropic → extended thinking budget; v1 applies it ONLY to agents WITHOUT tool grants (reasoning+tools on Anthropic is deferred — needs thinking-block preservation across tool turns). No effect on providers/models that don't support reasoning.

field.name: statusId
field.description: StatusItem statusTypeId=AiAgentStatus: AI_AGENT_DRAFT | AI_AGENT_ACTIVE | AI_AGENT_DISABLED

field.name: toolId
field.description: Opaque, stable identity (sequenced for user-created; explicit stable id in seed data). Renaming never breaks grants/history.

field.name: toolName
field.description: Derived verb_noun, snake_case, wire-safe (^[a-z0-9_]+$). The LLM-facing name. Unique across tools.

field.name: verb
field.description: Editable verb, e.g. list, cancel.

field.name: noun
field.description: Editable noun, e.g. orders, return.

field.name: description
field.description: LLM-facing "what / when to use".

field.name: serviceName
field.description: Backing Moqui service FQN — an attribute, NOT a key.

field.name: effectEnumId
field.description: Enumeration enumTypeId=AiToolEffect: AI_TOOL_READ_ONLY | AI_TOOL_MUTATING (derived from the service verb).

field.name: exposable
field.description: Y/N — may agents be granted this tool at all (denylist forces N).

field.name: requiresApproval
field.description: Y/N — run-time human gate (Phase 4: a proposed call suspends the run; see AiToolApproval).

field.name: sourceComponent
field.description: Provenance: which component seeded it; null if user-authored.

field.name: createdByUserId
field.description: Provenance for user-authored tools.

field.name: statusId
field.description: StatusItem statusTypeId=AiToolStatus: AI_TOOL_ACTIVE | AI_TOOL_DISABLED.

field.name: requiresApprovalOverride
field.description: Optional Y/N — lets one agent be stricter than the tool's default requiresApproval (never looser; the tool default is a floor).

field.name: priority
field.description: Lower is tried first (0,1,2,...). Sticky failover advances on provider-call failure.

field.name: agentId
field.description: The agent that produced this run (FK by id).

field.name: agentName
field.description: Denormalized snapshot of the agent's label AT RUN TIME, so history reads correctly after a rename.

field.name: statusId
field.description: StatusItem statusTypeId=AiAgentRunStatus: AI_RUN_RUNNING|AI_RUN_COMPLETED|AI_RUN_FAILED|AI_RUN_TRUNCATED|AI_RUN_ABORTED

field.name: servedByModelId
field.description: The model that actually served the run; differs from the configured primary when fallback occurred

field.name: providerRunId
field.description: The provider's own response id (OpenAI id / Anthropic message id), for support correlation

field.name: pendingState
field.description: Phase 4: JSON loop state when AI_RUN_SUSPENDED (messages, replayCount, stepSeq, candIdx, summary, result, turnToolCalls)

field.name: conversationId
field.description: Phase 2: the conversation this run belongs to (optional)

field.name: isPreview
field.description: Composer: Y when this run is a sandbox preview (ComposerServices.preview#Agent / AgentRunner.runPreview), where mutating tools are force-gated so the run SUSPENDS to show would-be calls without executing them. The run is throwaway, so its AI_RUN_SUSPENDED row + AI_APPR_PENDING approvals are excluded from the operator queue (ApprovalServices.get#PendingApproval, screen/AiOps/Approvals.xml) and deleted by discard#Draft. Null/absent = a normal run.

field.name: stepType
field.description: llm_call | tool_call | llm_call_failed | context_trim | compaction

field.name: toolId
field.description: The tool that was called (id); toolName/serviceName are display/dispatch snapshots.
